Quantitative and Statistical Analysis [applies correlation analysis to quantify relationships between individual answer aspects and perceived usefulness, and to evaluate how well existing automatic answer quality metrics align with human judgments]

Title: Technical Q&A Site Answer Recommendation via Question Boosting
EvaluationMetrics: discounted cumulative gain -dcg@k (k=2-5); matching score; precision; user study;
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis [conducts user studies to evaluate perceived usefulness, relevance, and satisfaction with the recommended answers]

Machine Learning (ML) [employs weakly supervised learning to train answer recommendation models using implicit signals rather than fully labeled datasets]

Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning [applies LSTM-based sequence-to-sequence models and convolutional neural networks to model semantic relationships between boosted questions and candidate answers]

Heuristic and Rule-Based Approaches [uses heuristic rules to enhance question representations and guide candidate answer selection prior to model-based ranking]

Title: Contextual Profiling of Stack Overflow Java Code Security Vulnerabilities Initial Insights from a Pilot Study
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis [performs manual code review and inductive analysis of vulnerable snippets and their surrounding context, including answers, comments, and edit histories, to assess contributor awareness and potential mitigation cues]

Quantitative and Statistical Analysis [applies static analysis at scale to quantify the frequency and distribution of security vulnerabilities across a large corpus of Java code snippets]

Text Analysis and Natural Language Processing [profiles contextual information around code snippets to understand how textual explanations and discussions influence the likelihood of vulnerability propagation]

Program and Code Analysis [uses automated vulnerability detection techniques to identify security-related coding faults in Java snippets and analyze their potential impact if reused in real-world software]

Title: Detecting Duplicate Questions in Stack Overflow via Semantic and Relevance Approaches
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning [employs Siamese bidirectional LSTM architectures with soft alignment attention to model word-level semantic interactions between paired questions]

Text Analysis and Natural Language Processing [represents question text using document and word embeddings as well as topic modeling to capture semantic context at multiple granularities]

Relevance, Ranking, and Evaluation [combines semantic matching and relevance matching signals to compute similarity scores and evaluate duplicate detection effectiveness through ranking and classification-based matching]

Title: Rollback Edit Inconsistencies in Developer Forum
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis [conducts an in-depth qualitative study and user study to categorize different types of rollback inconsistencies and to understand how such inconsistencies affect contributors’ perceptions, motivation, and editing behavior]

Quantitative and Statistical Analysis [performs statistical analysis to examine correlations between rollback inconsistencies and post quality indicators such as popularity, engagement, and answer outcomes]

Heuristic and Rule-Based Approaches [develops rule-based detection techniques to automatically identify multiple types of rollback edit inconsistencies by comparing pre- and post-rollback revisions]

Title: Characterization and Prediction of Questions without Accepted Answers on Stack Overflow
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Machine Learning (ML) [trains multiple supervised models, including gradient-boosted trees and linear and probabilistic classifiers, to predict whether a question will receive an accepted answer based solely on features available at submission time]

Program and Code Analysis [performs static analysis of code-related attributes within questions, such as code presence and size, to model how technical detail contributes to question resolution]

Miscellaneous [uses k-fold cross-validation to ensure robust evaluation and mitigate overfitting when training and comparing predictive models at scale]

Title: Beyond Relevance: Trustworthy Answer Selection via Consensus Verification
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning [employs BERT-based relevance matching combined with neural verification modules, including pivoted attention mechanisms, self-interaction networks, and deep neural architectures to model answer–evidence consistency]

Text Analysis and Natural Language Processing [introduces a matching–verification framework that retrieves external supporting evidence, distills consensus representations, and verifies answer consistency against aggregated crowd knowledge]

Title: Recency and quality-based ranking question in CQAs: A Stack Overflow case study
EvaluationMetrics: f1 score; normalized cumulative gain discount (ndcc@k, k=1-10); precision; recall;
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis [constructs ground truth ranking labels through manual annotation to distinguish high-quality and low-quality questions]

Machine Learning (ML) [applies a wide range of supervised learning-to-rank algorithms, including boosting-, neural-, tree-, and margin-based rankers, to learn optimal question ranking functions]

Relevance, Ranking, and Evaluation [evaluates ranking effectiveness using learning-to-rank frameworks that combine relevance, quality, and recency features to improve question ordering in CQAs]

Title: How to Formulate Specific How-to Questions in Software Development?
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis [conducts user studies and qualitative analysis of developer-authored how-to questions to identify recurring patterns, shortcomings, and best practices in question formulation]

Text Analysis and Natural Language Processing [applies linguistic and conceptual mutation techniques to transform vague questions into more specific variants by refining action verbs, objects, and contextual details]

Data Mining and Graph-Based Models [constructs and mines knowledge graphs from existing high-quality questions to extract seed tasks and guide the generation of more specific how-to question formulations]

Title: PTM4Tag: Sharpening Tag Recommendation of Stack Overflow Posts with Pre-Trained Models
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning [applies transfer learning using multiple pre-trained language models and fine-tunes a BERT-based multi-label classifier to predict relevant tags for Stack Overflow posts]

Text Analysis and Natural Language Processing [preprocesses post content by removing HTML artifacts and compares performance against embedding-based baselines to enhance semantic representation quality]

Miscellaneous [conducts ablation studies to analyze the contribution of different model components and input features to overall tag recommendation performance]

Title: A Study of C/C++ Code Weaknesses on Stack Overflow
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis [conducts qualitative inspection and in-depth analysis of selected C/C++ code snippets to understand the nature, context, and causes of observed security weaknesses]

Quantitative and Statistical Analysis [performs large-scale quantitative analysis to measure the frequency, distribution, and trends of different security weaknesses across Stack Overflow posts]

Data Mining and Graph-Based Models [applies data mining techniques and analyzes user behavior patterns to study how insecure code is shared, reused, and propagated within the community]

Program and Code Analysis [uses static code analysis tools to detect security weaknesses, map findings to standardized vulnerability categories, and analyze code revisions to observe how weaknesses evolve over time]

Title: An Empirical Study of C++ Vulnerabilities in Crowd-Sourced Code Examples
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis [conducts manual code review and qualitative inspection of vulnerable C++ snippets to understand vulnerability causes, contexts, and developer awareness]

Text Analysis and Natural Language Processing [analyzes syntactic structures of code and surrounding text to support vulnerability understanding and classification]

Program and Code Analysis [performs automated vulnerability classification, maps findings to standardized weakness categories, and applies clone detection to study reuse and propagation of vulnerable code snippets]

Title: Ask It Right! Identifying Low-Quality questions on Community Question Answering Services
EvaluationMetrics: f1 score; kaplan-meier estimator; precision; recall;
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Quantitative and Statistical Analysis [applies survival analysis to model the time until question closure and to study how different tags and closure reasons influence question longevity]

Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning [employs transformer-based semantic modeling combined with graph convolutional networks to jointly learn question–tag representations, and uses late fusion techniques for low-quality question detection]

Title: Generating High Quality Titles in StackOverflow via Data Denoising Method
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Machine Learning (ML) [applies a confidence-based clustering learning approach to group code snippets by functionality and estimate label reliability for filtering low-quality title–code pairs]

Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning [uses transformer-based sequence generation models trained on denoised datasets to generate concise and semantically accurate question titles]

Heuristic and Rule-Based Approaches [employs heuristic data denoising and pruning strategies based on confidence thresholds to remove noisy or low-quality training instances]

Miscellaneous [uses cross-validation to estimate confidence distributions and evaluate the robustness of the denoising and title generation process]

Title: Predicting Rollback Edits on Stack Overflow Based on Deep Fusion of Metadata and Text
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Quantitative and Statistical Analysis
[Logistic regression–based empirical analysis to identify and interpret metadata factors significantly associated with rollback likelihood.]

Machine Learning (ML)
[Baseline predictive modeling using logistic regression trained on structured metadata features.]

Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning
[Deep Fusion of Metadata and Text (DFMT) architecture combining BiLSTM-based textual encoders, CNN and attention-enhanced variants, and BERT representations with metadata via multi-head attention and global attention mechanisms.]

Title: SOTitle: A Transformer-based Post Title Generation Approach for Stack Overflow
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Machine Learning (ML)
[Multi-task learning formulation that treats title generation for different programming languages as related tasks to improve generalization and shared representation learning.]

Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning
[Transformer-based sequence-to-sequence model with multi-head attention, leveraging multi-modal inputs (problem description and code snippets) and beam search decoding to generate high-quality titles.]

Text Analysis and Natural Language Processing
[Subword-level tokenization using SentencePiece to handle vocabulary diversity and out-of-vocabulary terms across natural language and source code.]

Heuristic and Rule-Based Approaches
[Heuristic filtering rules to construct a high-quality training corpus by selecting well-scored questions with accepted answers and code snippets.]

Title: Is this question going to be closed? Answering question closibility on Stack Exchange
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Quantitative and Statistical Analysis
[Handling class imbalance between open and closed questions using synthetic minority over-sampling to improve classifier robustness.]

Machine Learning (ML)
[Supervised classification using Gradient Boosting, Naive Bayes, Logistic Regression, and Random Forest models trained on manually engineered textual and non-textual features.]

Title: Improving Stack Overflow question title generation with copying enhanced CodeBERT model and bi-modal information
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis
[Manual human evaluation of generated titles using predefined readability and correlation criteria to complement automated metrics.]

Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning
[Copying-enhanced CodeBERT (CCBERT) model based on an encoder–decoder Transformer architecture, incorporating bi-modal encoding of text and code, multi-head self-attention, and an explicit copy mechanism to handle rare and domain-specific tokens.]

Title: Analyzing Techniques for Duplicate Question Detection on Q&A Websites for Game Developers
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Quantitative and Statistical Analysis
[Construction of balanced and representative datasets through controlled sampling of duplicate and non-duplicate question pairs from Stack Exchange data dumps.]

Machine Learning (ML)
[Supervised classification using a Random Forest model that combines multiple similarity scores to predict whether two questions are duplicates.]

Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning
[Use of unsupervised and pre-trained language models, including MPNet sentence embeddings, to generate dense semantic representations of questions.]

Relevance, Ranking, and Evaluation
[Application of cosine similarity and recall-rate@k–based ranking evaluation to assess how effectively techniques surface true duplicate questions among top recommendations.]

Title: The reproducibility of programming-related issues in Stack Overflow questions
EvaluationMetrics: chi-squared test; cliff's delta; mann-whitney-wilcoxon test;
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis
[In-depth manual examination of question texts and code snippets, including systematic reproduction attempts and categorization of reproducibility status and underlying challenges.]

Quantitative and Statistical Analysis
[Statistical analysis of reproducibility rates across languages and correlation analysis between reproducibility status and answer-related meta-data such as accepted answers, response delay, and answer count.]

Heuristic and Rule-Based Approaches
[Rule-based classification of reproducibility outcomes using predefined criteria and editing-action taxonomies to distinguish reproducible and irreproducible issues.]

Title: Studying the Long-Term Value Answers on Stack Overflow
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis
[Manual categorization of questions associated with long-term value answers to identify thematic types (e.g., how-to, review, conceptual) that sustain usefulness over time.]

Quantitative and Statistical Analysis
[Exploratory and correlational analysis of temporal voting patterns and multivariate statistical modeling to distinguish long-term versus short-term value answers.]

Machine Learning (ML)
[Logistic regression modeling employed as an explanatory framework to quantify the association between answer-, question-, tag-, and user-related factors and long-term answer value.]

Title: Towards Quality Improvement and Prediction of Closed Questions on Stack Overflow
EvaluationMetrics: accuracy; f1 score; multi-class log loss (mll); precision; recall;
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Quantitative and Statistical Analysis
[Addressing severe class imbalance by combining SMOTE oversampling with random undersampling and Tomek-link–based data cleaning.]

Machine Learning (ML)
[Multi-class classification using XGBoost, Random Forest, and Vowpal Wabbit models to predict both question closure and its associated reason.]

Title: Context-Aware Answer Selection in Community Question Answering Exploiting Spatial Temporal Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory
EvaluationMetrics: accuracy; f1 score; mean average precision (map); mean reciprocal rank; precision; recall;
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning
[Spatial–temporal Bi-LSTM architecture that captures forward (question-to-answer) and backward (answer-to-answer) dependencies, followed by max-pooling and softmax layers for quality answer selection.]

Text Analysis and Natural Language Processing
[Extensive text preprocessing and semantic encoding, including tokenization, parsing, lemmatization, stop-word removal, POS tagging, named-entity extraction, and Par2Vec-based paragraph-level vector representations for context-aware modeling.]

Title: A novel hybrid CNN-LSTM approach for assessing Stack Overflow post quality
EvaluationMetrics: accuracy; f1 score; mann-whitney u-test results; precision; recall;
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Machine Learning (ML)
[Formulation of post quality assessment as a multi-class classification problem distinguishing very good, good, bad, and very bad questions.]

Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning
[Hybrid Convolutional Neural Network–Long Short-Term Memory architecture in which CNN layers learn discriminative feature representations and LSTM layers capture sequential and long-range dependencies among extracted features.]

Title: Diverse title generation for Stack Overflow posts with multiple-sampling-enhanced transformer
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis
[Manual human evaluation involving experienced programmers who rate generated titles on readability, correlation, diversity, and usability, with inter-rater agreement analysis.]

Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning
[M3NSCT5 framework built on a CodeT5 sequence-to-sequence Transformer backbone, enhanced with maximal marginal multiple nucleus sampling to jointly optimize title quality and diversity during decoding, and pre-trained on large-scale code corpora.]

Title: Dual-interactive fusion for code-mixed deep representation learning in tag recommendation
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning
[CDR4Tag framework that integrates code-mixed deep representations using dual-interactive fusion, combining connective and separative semantic interaction modules with hierarchy-aware semantic learning and GraphCodeBERT-based code encoding.]

Text Analysis and Natural Language Processing
[Sentence-pair matching formulation that jointly encodes software objects and candidate tags to capture semantic correlations between descriptions, code snippets, and tags for recommendation.]

Title: KEIC: A Tag Recommendation Framework with Knowledge Enhancement and Interclass Correlation
EvaluationMetrics: f1 score; ndcg; precision; psp (propensity scored precision); recall;
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Machine Learning (ML)
[Multi-label classification baselines enhanced within the KEIC framework, including FastText-based models (KEIC-FastText) to assess gains from knowledge and correlation integration.]

Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning
[KEIC framework instantiated with multiple encoders—KEIC-XML-CNN, KEIC-AttentionXML, and KEIC-BERT—that combine Transformer-based sequence encoding, correlation networks (CorNet) to capture interclass dependencies, and bottlenecked correlation stacks to control parameter growth.]

Text Analysis and Natural Language Processing
[Knowledge integration via knowledge graph augmentation (e.g., ConceptNet/CN-DBpedia) to inject entity-centric triples into inputs, coupled with sequence encoding and correlation capture to enhance semantic understanding and tag prediction.]

Title: Textual tag recommendation with multi-tag topical attention
EvaluationMetrics: cross-entropy loss; f1 score; precision; recall;
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Machine Learning (ML)
[End-to-end multi-task learning that jointly optimizes neural topic generation and tag ranking to balance topic discovery and tag prediction.]

Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning
[Neural Topic Generator combined with a sequence encoder and a multi-tag topical attention mechanism, where dynamic neural topics guide tag-specific post representations for ranking.]

Text Analysis and Natural Language Processing
[Bag-of-Words (BoW) representations used for neural topic generation alongside sequential text encoding to capture both global topical signals and local semantic context.]

Relevance, Ranking, and Evaluation
[Multi-tag topical attention mechanism and a topic-guided tag ranker that produce tag-specific relevance scores, enabling effective ranking of candidate tags under long-tail distributions.]

Title: Duplicate Quora Questions Pair Detection using Siamese Bert and Ma-LSTM
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning
[Siamese neural network architectures employing pre-trained BERT encoders, Manhattan Distance LSTM (MaLSTM), and BiLSTM models to learn pairwise semantic similarity for duplicate detection.]

Text Analysis and Natural Language Processing
[Text preprocessing pipelines including tokenization, stopword removal, stemming or lemmatization, and representation learning via word embeddings such as Word2Vec and Google2Vec, alongside contextual embeddings from BERT.]

Relevance, Ranking, and Evaluation
[Similarity computation using cosine similarity between learned question embeddings, followed by threshold-based classification and evaluation using standard performance metrics.]

Title: Predicting answer acceptability for question-answering system
EvaluationMetrics: accuracy; auc/roc/auc-roc; f1 score; precision; recall;
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Quantitative and Statistical Analysis
[Mitigation of severe class imbalance between accepted and non-accepted answers using SMOTE-based oversampling and comparative statistical evaluation.]

Machine Learning (ML)
[Supervised classification using Naive Bayes, Random Forest, Logistic Regression, and Gradient Boosting models trained on combined textual and non-textual feature sets.]

Text Analysis and Natural Language Processing
[Data preprocessing including cleaning, normalization, stemming, lemmatization, and feature extraction from answer texts to support predictive modeling.]

Title: Automatic prediction of rejected edits in Stack Overflow
EvaluationMetrics: accuracy; f1 score; nasa tlx for workload; precision; recall;
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis
[Manual inspection and coding of rejected edits to derive a fine-grained taxonomy of rejection reasons and guide feature design.]

Machine Learning (ML)
[Supervised classification using Decision Trees, Random Forest, K-Nearest Neighbors, and eXtreme Gradient Boosting models trained on engineered text- and user-based features.]

Title: Automated Question Title Reformulation by Mining Modification Logs From Stack Overflow
EvaluationMetrics: bleu; consensus-based image description evaluation (cider); exact match (em); gleu; mean reciprocal rank; rouge;
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning
[T5-based encoder–decoder Transformer fine-tuned for title reformulation, modeling the task as neural text-to-text generation with beam search decoding.]

Qualitative Analysis
[Formative qualitative analysis of title edit logs to identify common reformulation patterns, complemented by a human study evaluating readability, relevance, and usefulness of generated titles.]

Text Analysis and Natural Language Processing
[Mining and preprocessing of Stack Overflow modification logs, linguistic normalization, subword tokenization (SentencePiece), and multi-modal text modeling combining original titles and question bodies.]

Title: Is Stack Overflow Obsolete? An Empirical Study of the Characteristics of ChatGPT Answers to Stack Overflow Questions
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Text Analysis and Natural Language Processing
[Linguistic feature extraction and sentiment modeling using LIWC-based psycholinguistic analysis and a fine-tuned RoBERTa sentiment classifier.]

Qualitative Analysis
[In-depth manual coding of ChatGPT answers to develop a taxonomy of quality issues, complemented by a controlled user study and follow-up interviews with programmers.]

Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning
[Application of a RoBERTa-based Transformer model for sentiment analysis to quantify affective differences between ChatGPT and human-written answers.]

Title: Identifying Smart Contract Security Issues in Code Snippets from Stack Overflow
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis
[User study involving smart contract developers to assess real-world practices, security awareness, and risks associated with reusing Stack Overflow code snippets.]

Generative AI / Foundation Models
[Fine-tuned Llama2-based large language model used for completing fragmented smart contract code snippets prior to vulnerability analysis, enabling downstream symbolic execution and pattern-based detection.]

Title: Can We Identify Stack Overflow Questions Requiring Code Snippets? Investigating the Cause & Effect of Missing Code Snippets
EvaluationMetrics: accuracy; chi-squared test; cliff's delta; cohen's kappa; f1 score; mann-whitney-wilcoxon test; precision; recall;
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis
[Manual inspection of question revision histories and comments to categorize code snippet presence, complemented by a practitioner survey to understand why users omit required code snippets.]

Machine Learning (ML)
[Supervised classification using Random Forest, XGBoost, Artificial Neural Network, Gaussian Naive Bayes, K-Nearest Neighbors, and Support Vector Machines to predict whether a question requires code snippets.]

Text Analysis and Natural Language Processing
[Extraction of text-based features such as keywords, POS-based patterns, sentence structures, and code-like elements from question titles and bodies to support automated prediction models.]

Title: AUTOGENICS: Automated Generation of Context-Aware Inline Comments for Code Snippets on Programming Q&A Sites Using LLM
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis
[Manual evaluation of LLM-generated inline comments using Likert-scale ratings, complemented by a practitioner user study with active Stack Overflow users to assess perceived effectiveness, usefulness, and demand for automated inline commenting tools.]

Generative AI / Foundation Models
[Use of large language models, primarily Gemini 1.5 Pro and GPT-4, for inline comment generation; AUTOGENICS enhances standard LLM outputs by incorporating question context and applying rule-based noise filtering to produce higher-quality, context-aware comments.]

Title: Reproducibility of issues reported in stack overflow questions: Challenges, impact & estimation
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis
[Practitioner survey and manual qualitative analysis to validate a catalog of reproducibility challenges, estimate their severity and impact on answering questions, and elicit requirements for tool support.]

Machine Learning (ML)
[Supervised classification using Random Forest, XGBoost, Artificial Neural Network, Naive Bayes, and K-Nearest Neighbors to predict reproducible vs. irreproducible issues based on extracted code features.]

Quantitative and Statistical Analysis
[Application of SMOTE oversampling to address class imbalance and statistical analyses to evaluate model performance and feature significance.]

Title: PTM4Tag+: Tag recommendation of stack overflow posts with pre-trained models
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning
[Transformer-based multi-label classification framework with a triplet architecture that independently encodes title, description, and code using pre-trained models (BERT, RoBERTa, CodeBERT, BERTOverflow, ALBERT, PLBART, CoTexT, CodeT5) and their lightweight variants (DistilBERT, DistilRoBERTa, CodeBERT-small, CodeT5-small), followed by embedding concatenation and neural classification.]

Title: Towards Better Answers: Automated Stack Overflow Post Updating
EvaluationMetrics: exact match (em); f1 score; precision; recall;
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Qualitative Analysis
[Manual inspection of comment–edit pairs to define validity criteria, qualitative error analysis of generated updates, and in-the-wild evaluation via real Stack Overflow edit submissions reviewed by community maintainers.]

Generative AI / Foundation Models
[Fine-tuned CodeLlama with prompt learning and low-rank adaptation (LoRA) to (i) predict valid comment–edit pairs and (ii) generate updated code snippets conditioned on comments, evaluated against baselines including prompt-only LLMs.]

Title: Does Editing Improve Answer Quality on Stack Overflow? A Data-Driven  Investigation
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Quantitative and Statistical Analysis
[Large-scale comparative analysis of initial vs. latest answer revisions using non-parametric statistical tests (Mann–Whitney–Wilcoxon), effect sizes (Cliff’s Delta), and objective static and dynamic code analysis across six quality dimensions.]

Title: Detecting question relatedness in programming Q&A communities via bimodal feature fusion
Categorized_Methodology_Details:
Deep Learning (DL) / Transformer-Based Deep Learning
[Bimodal feature fusion framework that integrates SOBERT for question text encoding and UniXcoder for code-aware representation learning, combining both modalities through neural fusion layers to predict question relatedness.]
